title: koeleria pumila
intro: Koeleria pumila, also known as small hair grass or dwarf koeleria, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koeleria pumila include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Koeleria pumila can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
